title: ClusterRunResponse
description: Schema for ClusterRunResponse in Nuix REST API

guid.description: The GUID of the cluster run.

clusterName.description: The name of the cluster run.

clusters.description: A list of all clusters associated with this cluster run.

resemblanceThreshold.description: Gets the resemblance threshold associated with the cluster run, irrespective of what clustering options are set.

useChainedNearDuplicatesEnabled.description: Gets whether or not chained near-duplicates were used during clustering.

useEmailThreadsEnabled.description: Gets whether or not email threads were used during clustering.
